option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <manifest xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android">
<uses-permission android:name="android.permission.WRITE_EXTERNAL_STORAGE" android:maxSdkVersion="28" />
<application android:allowBackup="true" android:dataExtractionRules="@xml/data_extraction_rules" android:fullBackupContent="@xml/backup_rules" android:icon="@mipmap/ic_launcher" android:label="@string/app_name" android:roundIcon="@mipmap/ic_launcher_round" android:supportsRtl="true" android:theme="@style/Theme.TickTick"> <activity android:name=".SplashActivity" android:exported="true" android:theme="@style/Theme.TickTick.Splash"> <intent-filter> <action android:name="android.intent.action.MAIN" />
<category android:name="android.intent.category.LAUNCHER" /> </intent-filter> </activity> <activity android:name=".MainActivity" android:exported="false" /> </application>
</manifest>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <manifest xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android">
<uses-permission android:name="android.permission.POST_NOTIFICATIONS" /> <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.RECEIVE_BOOT_COMPLETED" />
<uses-permission android:name="android.permission.WRITE_EXTERNAL_STORAGE" android:maxSdkVersion="28" />
<application android:allowBackup="true" android:dataExtractionRules="@xml/data_extraction_rules" android:fullBackupContent="@xml/backup_rules" android:icon="@mipmap/ic_launcher" android:label="@string/app_name" android:roundIcon="@mipmap/ic_launcher_round" android:supportsRtl="true" android:theme="@style/Theme.TickTick"> <activity android:name=".SplashActivity" android:exported="true" android:theme="@style/Theme.TickTick.Splash"> <intent-filter> <action android:name="android.intent.action.MAIN" />
<category android:name="android.intent.category.LAUNCHER" /> </intent-filter> </activity> <activity android:name=".MainActivity" android:exported="false" />
<receiver android:name=".DueTaskReceiver" android:exported="false" />
<receiver android:name=".BootReceiver" android:enabled="true" android:exported="false"> <intent-filter> <action android:name="android.intent.action.BOOT_COMPLETED" /> <action android:name="android.intent.action.MY_PACKAGE_REPLACED" /> </intent-filter> </receiver> </application>
</manifest>

option.name: updatedContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <LinearLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="20dp">
<TextView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/new_task" android:textColor="@color/text_primary" android:textSize="18sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:paddingBottom="12dp"/>
<EditText android:id="@+id/et_task_title" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:hint="@string/task_title_hint" android:textSize="15sp" android:inputType="textCapSentences" android:autofillHints="no" android:background="@drawable/bg_card" android:padding="12dp" android:singleLine="true"/>
<EditText android:id="@+id/et_task_description" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:hint="@string/description_hint" android:textSize="14sp" android:inputType="textMultiLine|textCapSentences" android:autofillHints="no" android:background="@drawable/bg_card" android:padding="12dp" android:layout_marginTop="10dp" android:minLines="2" android:maxLines="4" android:gravity="top|start"/>
<TextView android:id="@+id/et_task_date" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:hint="@string/due_date_hint" android:textSize="14sp" android:textColorHint="@color/text_hint" android:textColor="@color/text_primary" android:background="@drawable/bg_card" android:padding="12dp" android:layout_marginTop="10dp" android:clickable="true" android:focusable="true" android:drawableStart="@drawable/ic_clock" android:drawablePadding="8dp" android:gravity="center_vertical"/>
<LinearLayout style="?android:attr/buttonBarStyle" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" android:gravity="end">
<Button android:id="@+id/btn_cancel" style="?android:attr/buttonBarButtonStyle" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/cancel" android:textColor="@color/text_secondary"/>
<Button android:id="@+id/btn_save" style="?android:attr/buttonBarButtonStyle" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/save" android:layout_marginStart="8dp" app:backgroundTint="@color/primary_blue"/>
</LinearLayout>
</LinearLayout>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <LinearLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="20dp">
<TextView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/new_task" android:textColor="@color/text_primary" android:textSize="18sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:paddingBottom="12dp"/>
<EditText android:id="@+id/et_task_title" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:hint="@string/task_title_hint" android:textSize="15sp" android:inputType="textCapSentences" android:autofillHints="no" android:background="@drawable/bg_card" android:padding="12dp" android:singleLine="true"/>
<EditText android:id="@+id/et_task_description" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:hint="@string/description_hint" android:textSize="14sp" android:inputType="textMultiLine|textCapSentences" android:autofillHints="no" android:background="@drawable/bg_card" android:padding="12dp" android:layout_marginTop="10dp" android:minLines="2" android:maxLines="4" android:gravity="top|start"/>
<TextView android:id="@+id/et_task_date" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:hint="@string/due_date_hint" android:textSize="14sp" android:textColorHint="@color/text_hint" android:textColor="@color/text_primary" android:background="@drawable/bg_card" android:padding="12dp" android:layout_marginTop="10dp" android:clickable="true" android:focusable="true" android:drawableStart="@drawable/ic_clock" android:drawablePadding="8dp" android:gravity="center_vertical"/>
<TextView android:id="@+id/tv_task_reminder" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/reminder_none" android:textSize="14sp" android:textColor="@color/text_primary" android:background="@drawable/bg_card" android:padding="12dp" android:layout_marginTop="10dp" android:clickable="true" android:focusable="true" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:drawableStart="@drawable/ic_bell" android:drawablePadding="8dp"/>
<TextView android:id="@+id/tv_task_repeat" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/repeat_none" android:textSize="14sp" android:textColor="@color/text_primary" android:background="@drawable/bg_card" android:padding="12dp" android:layout_marginTop="10dp" android:clickable="true" android:focusable="true" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:drawableStart="@drawable/ic_more" android:drawablePadding="8dp"/>
<Button android:id="@+id/btn_clear_fields" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="14dp" android:text="@string/clear" android:textAllCaps="false" android:textColor="@color/white" app:backgroundTint="@color/tag_daily"/>
<LinearLayout style="?android:attr/buttonBarStyle" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" android:gravity="end">
<Button android:id="@+id/btn_cancel" style="?android:attr/buttonBarButtonStyle" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/cancel" android:textColor="@color/text_secondary"/>
<Button android:id="@+id/btn_save" style="?android:attr/buttonBarButtonStyle" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/save" android:layout_marginStart="8dp" app:backgroundTint="@color/primary_blue"/>
</LinearLayout>
</LinearLayout>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <LinearLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="20dp">
<!-- Title --> <TextView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/pick_date" android:textColor="@color/text_primary" android:textSize="18sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:paddingBottom="8dp"/>
<!-- Month + Day row using CalendarView --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="center" android:baselineAligned="false">
<!-- Day picker --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:orientation="vertical" android:gravity="center">
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/label_day" android:textColor="@color/text_secondary" android:textSize="12sp" android:paddingBottom="4dp"/>
<NumberPicker android:id="@+id/np_day" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="100dp"/>
</LinearLayout>
<!-- Month picker --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="2" android:orientation="vertical" android:gravity="center">
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/label_month" android:textColor="@color/text_secondary" android:textSize="12sp" android:paddingBottom="4dp"/>
<NumberPicker android:id="@+id/np_month" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="100dp"/>
</LinearLayout>
<!-- Year picker (scroll) --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1.5" android:orientation="vertical" android:gravity="center">
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/label_year" android:textColor="@color/text_secondary" android:textSize="12sp" android:paddingBottom="4dp"/>
<NumberPicker android:id="@+id/np_year" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="100dp"/>
</LinearLayout>
</LinearLayout>
<!-- Divider --> <View android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="1dp" android:background="@color/divider" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" android:layout_marginBottom="8dp"/>
<!-- Time toggle --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:paddingVertical="4dp">
<ImageView android:layout_width="18dp" android:layout_height="18dp" android:src="@drawable/ic_clock" android:alpha="0.6" android:contentDescription="@string/add_time"/>
<TextView android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:layout_marginStart="8dp" android:text="@string/add_time" android:textColor="@color/text_primary" android:textSize="14sp"/>
<com.google.android.material.switchmaterial.SwitchMaterial android:id="@+id/switch_time" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:checked="false"/>
</LinearLayout>
<!-- TimePicker (hidden by default) --> <TimePicker android:id="@+id/time_picker" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:timePickerMode="spinner" android:visibility="gone" android:layout_marginTop="4dp"/>
<!-- Buttons --> <LinearLayout style="?android:attr/buttonBarStyle" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="end" android:layout_marginTop="8dp">
<Button android:id="@+id/btn_date_clear" style="?android:attr/buttonBarButtonStyle" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/clear_date" android:textColor="@color/text_secondary"/>
<Button android:id="@+id/btn_date_cancel" style="?android:attr/buttonBarButtonStyle" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/cancel" android:textColor="@color/text_secondary"/>
<Button android:id="@+id/btn_date_ok" style="?android:attr/buttonBarButtonStyle" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/ok" android:textColor="@color/primary_blue"/>
</LinearLayout>
</LinearLayout>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <LinearLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="20dp">
<!-- Title --> <TextView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/pick_date" android:textColor="@color/text_primary" android:textSize="18sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:paddingBottom="8dp"/>
<!-- Month + Day row using CalendarView --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="center" android:baselineAligned="false">
<!-- Day picker --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:orientation="vertical" android:gravity="center">
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/label_day" android:textColor="@color/text_secondary" android:textSize="12sp" android:paddingBottom="4dp"/>
<NumberPicker android:id="@+id/np_day" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="100dp"/>
</LinearLayout>
<!-- Month picker --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="2" android:orientation="vertical" android:gravity="center">
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/label_month" android:textColor="@color/text_secondary" android:textSize="12sp" android:paddingBottom="4dp"/>
<NumberPicker android:id="@+id/np_month" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="100dp"/>
</LinearLayout>
<!-- Year picker (scroll) --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1.5" android:orientation="vertical" android:gravity="center">
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/label_year" android:textColor="@color/text_secondary" android:textSize="12sp" android:paddingBottom="4dp"/>
<NumberPicker android:id="@+id/np_year" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="100dp"/>
</LinearLayout>
</LinearLayout>
<!-- Divider --> <View android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="1dp" android:background="@color/divider" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" android:layout_marginBottom="8dp"/>
<!-- Time toggle --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:paddingVertical="4dp">
<ImageView android:layout_width="18dp" android:layout_height="18dp" android:src="@drawable/ic_clock" android:alpha="0.6" android:contentDescription="@string/add_time"/>
<TextView android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:layout_marginStart="8dp" android:text="@string/add_time" android:textColor="@color/text_primary" android:textSize="14sp"/>
<com.google.android.material.switchmaterial.SwitchMaterial android:id="@+id/switch_time" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:checked="false"/>
</LinearLayout>
<!-- TimePicker (hidden by default) --> <TimePicker android:id="@+id/time_picker" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:timePickerMode="spinner" android:visibility="gone" android:layout_marginTop="4dp"/>
<!-- Buttons --> <LinearLayout style="?android:attr/buttonBarStyle" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="end" android:layout_marginTop="8dp">
<Button android:id="@+id/btn_date_cancel" style="?android:attr/buttonBarButtonStyle" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/cancel" android:textColor="@color/text_secondary"/>
<Button android:id="@+id/btn_date_ok" style="?android:attr/buttonBarButtonStyle" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/ok" android:textColor="@color/primary_blue"/>
</LinearLayout>
<Button android:id="@+id/btn_date_clear" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="10dp" android:text="@string/clear_date" android:textAllCaps="false" android:textColor="@color/white" android:backgroundTint="@color/tag_daily"/>
</LinearLayout>

option.name: originalContent
option.value: <resources> <string name="app_name">TickTick</string> <string name="today">Today</string> <string name="next_7_days">Next 7 Days</string> <string name="inbox">Inbox</string> <string name="lists">Lists</string> <string name="filters">Filters</string> <string name="completed">Completed</string> <string name="add_task">Add Task</string> <string name="this_week">This Week</string> <string name="unscheduled">Unscheduled</string> <string name="work_tasks">Work Tasks</string> <string name="study_goals">Study Goals</string> <string name="travel_plans">Travel Plans</string> <string name="daily_todos">Daily To-Dos</string> <string name="life_errands">Life Errands</string> <string name="add_list">Add List</string> <string name="no_tasks">No tasks</string> <string name="task_title_hint">Task name</string> <string name="cancel">Cancel</string> <string name="save">Save</string> <string name="delete">Delete</string> <string name="new_task">New Task</string> <string name="subtasks">Subtasks</string> <string name="add_subtask">Add subtask</string> <string name="due_date">Due Date</string> <string name="priority">Priority</string> <string name="notes">Notes</string> <string name="tomorrow">Tomorrow</string> <string name="task_details">Task Details</string> <string name="splash_subtitle">Manage your tasks efficiently</string> <string name="search">Search</string> <string name="search_hint">Search tasks…</string> <string name="due_date_hint">Due date (e.g. 07:00, Sep 6)</string> <string name="subtask_count_format">%1$d/%2$d</string> <string name="pick_date">Pick a Date</string> <string name="label_day">Day</string> <string name="label_month">Month</string> <string name="label_year">Year</string> <string name="add_time">Add time</string> <string name="clear_date">Clear</string> <string name="ok">OK</string> <string name="menu">Menu</string> <string name="sort">Sort</string> <string name="logo">Logo</string> <string name="ticktick">TickTick</string> <string name="profile">Profile</string> <string name="focus">Focus</string> <string name="tasks">Tasks</string> <string name="calendar">Calendar</string> <string name="more">More</string> <string name="description_hint">Add description…</string> <string name="export_today">Export Today\'s Tasks</string> <string name="export_7days">Export Next 7 Days\' Tasks</string> <string name="export_saved_image">Saved image → Pictures/TickTick</string> <string name="export_saved_pdf">Saved PDF → Downloads/TickTick</string> <string name="export_no_tasks">No tasks to export</string> <string name="export_failed">Export failed</string> </resources>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value: <resources> <string name="app_name">TickTick</string> <string name="today">Today</string> <string name="next_7_days">Next 7 Days</string> <string name="inbox">Inbox</string> <string name="lists">Lists</string> <string name="filters">Filters</string> <string name="completed">Completed</string> <string name="add_task">Add Task</string> <string name="this_week">This Week</string> <string name="unscheduled">Unscheduled</string> <string name="work_tasks">Work Tasks</string> <string name="study_goals">Study Goals</string> <string name="travel_plans">Travel Plans</string> <string name="daily_todos">Daily To-Dos</string> <string name="life_errands">Life Errands</string> <string name="add_list">Add List</string> <string name="no_tasks">No tasks</string> <string name="task_title_hint">Task name</string> <string name="cancel">Cancel</string> <string name="save">Save</string> <string name="delete">Delete</string> <string name="new_task">New Task</string> <string name="subtasks">Subtasks</string> <string name="add_subtask">Add subtask</string> <string name="due_date">Due Date</string> <string name="priority">Priority</string> <string name="notes">Notes</string> <string name="tomorrow">Tomorrow</string> <string name="task_details">Task Details</string> <string name="splash_subtitle">Manage your tasks efficiently</string> <string name="search">Search</string> <string name="search_hint">Search tasks…</string> <string name="due_date_hint">Due date (e.g. 07:00, Sep 6)</string> <string name="subtask_count_format">%1$d/%2$d</string> <string name="pick_date">Pick a Date</string> <string name="label_day">Day</string> <string name="label_month">Month</string> <string name="label_year">Year</string> <string name="add_time">Add time</string> <string name="clear_date">Clear</string> <string name="ok">OK</string> <string name="menu">Menu</string> <string name="sort">Sort</string> <string name="logo">Logo</string> <string name="ticktick">TickTick</string> <string name="profile">Profile</string> <string name="focus">Focus</string> <string name="tasks">Tasks</string> <string name="calendar">Calendar</string> <string name="more">More</string> <string name="description_hint">Add description…</string> <string name="clear">Clear</string> <string name="reminder_none">Reminder: None</string> <string name="reminder_at_due">Reminder: At time of event</string> <string name="reminder_5m">Reminder: 5 minutes before</string> <string name="reminder_15m">Reminder: 15 minutes before</string> <string name="reminder_30m">Reminder: 30 minutes before</string> <string name="reminder_1h">Reminder: 1 hour before</string> <string name="repeat_none">Repeat: None</string> <string name="repeat_daily">Repeat: Daily</string> <string name="repeat_weekly">Repeat: Weekly</string> <string name="repeat_monthly">Repeat: Monthly</string> <string name="need_due_date_for_reminder">Please choose a due date before setting reminder</string> <string name="notification_channel_due_events">Due events</string> <string name="notification_channel_due_events_desc">Notifications for tasks near due time</string> <string name="notification_permission_needed">Enable notification permission to receive reminders</string> <string name="export_today">Export Today\'s Tasks</string> <string name="export_7days">Export Next 7 Days\' Tasks</string> <string name="export_saved_image">Saved image → Pictures/TickTick</string> <string name="export_saved_pdf">Saved PDF → Downloads/TickTick</string> <string name="export_no_tasks">No tasks to export</string> <string name="export_failed">Export failed</string> </resources>
